overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing third-person combat in a sunny coastal urban construction zone. The player character moves through a makeshift barricade area, engaging hostile NPCs in a firefight near derelict vehicles and sandbag fortifications, with a rollercoaster and futuristic city skyline visible in the background.

spotting first hostile NPC near sandbag pile and initiating combat

large rectangular billboard structure with orange face and metal framework
tall futuristic skyscraper with green-tinted glass facade in the distance
red and white striped metal barriers blocking off construction zones
stacked beige sandbags forming defensive positions

segments.scene_description: The player enters a sunny coastal construction zone, passing a derelict yellow sports car and orange billboard. Moving past striped barriers, the character spots the first hostile enemy near sandbag fortifications and prepares for combat.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandbag fortified combat area with scaffolding

events.description: taking cover behind sandbag barricade and exchanging fire with hostile NPCs
moving from cover position to advance toward derelict red vehicle

agents.ego_description: taking cover behind sandbag barricades, popping up to shoot at enemies, then advancing tactically

rusted metal scaffolding structure against the building wall

metal barrel with flames and smoke rising from it

segments.scene_description: Active combat erupts as the player takes cover behind sandbags, exchanging fire with enemies near a green dumpster. The character advances past a burning barrel toward a derelict red car while navigating around metal scaffolding.

moving toward ally taking cover near the concrete wall

silver metal safety railing along elevated platform edge

segments.scene_description: The player moves through the open construction yard, passing metal barriers and engaging enemies near the derelict red sedan. An ally is spotted crouching behind the vehicle as the player advances toward a concrete wall section with metal railings.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered position behind sandbags near rollercoaster

events.description: taking cover behind sandbags with ally and shooting at distant enemies near rollercoaster
continuing firefight from covered position, suppressing enemy movement

agents.ego_description: crouched behind sandbag barricade next to bald ally in gray coat, firing at enemies visible near the rollercoaster structure

notable_agents.action: bald ally in gray coat taking cover behind sandbags and shooting over the top
enemy in red pants visible near rollercoaster tracks, returning fire

entered.detail: large metal rollercoaster framework with blue tracks visible against the sky
damaged concrete wall with holes and graffiti providing cover

segments.scene_description: The player joins an ally behind sandbag fortifications next to a damaged concrete wall. Together they engage in a firefight with enemies visible near the rollercoaster structure in the distance, maintaining cover while shooting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunny coastal construction zone that evolves from a cautious approach into an intense, coordinated firefight. It begins as the player passes a derelict yellow sports car and orange billboards, moving past striped barriers toward the first hostile enemies stationed near sandbag fortifications. As combat erupts, the camera advances through the chaos, weaving past a green dumpster and a burning barrel toward a derelict red car while navigating around metal scaffolding. The scene then opens into a wider construction yard, passing metal barriers and a crouching ally before pushing toward a concrete wall section with metal railings. Finally, the movement settles behind a line of sandbags where the player and ally maintain cover, exchanging fire with enemies positioned against the backdrop of a distant rollercoaster structure.
